laws.title: Public Law 32-233 | Literally Introducing Taxes (LIT)
laws.status_basis: The source repeals 26 U.S.C. 1 and imposes a 20% flat tax, and the live branch already contains the replacement text; only the historical note still needs cleanup.

provisions.text_summary: Short title, severability, and immediate-effective-date language.
provisions.evidence: "Literally Introducing Taxes"; "effective immediately"

provisions.text_summary: Repeal 26 U.S.C. 1 and replace it with a flat 20 percent individual income tax.
provisions.exact_change: Replace 26 U.S.C. 1 with the enacted flat tax text.
provisions.evidence: "26 U.S. Code 1 shall be repealed"; "flat tax of 20%"

current_implementation.detail: The replacement text is present in current XML and origin/main, but the historical note still carries dump-style quotedContent material.

recommended_actions: Keep the amended 26 U.S.C. 1 text in place.
Trim the historical note to a concise statutory-history entry.
laws.chronology_conclusion: The source repeals 26 U.S.C. 1 and imposes a 20% flat tax, and the live branch already contains the replacement text; only the historical note still needs cleanup.

provisions.evidence: "Judicial Integrity and Accountability Act of 2025"; "transfer all judicial misconduct complaint authority to the Supreme Court"
